name: higgsfield-generate
description: Generate images and videos via Higgsfield AI across 30+ models plus Marketing Studio branded ads, wrapping the higgsfield CLI for text/image/video-to-media jobs.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images and videos via Higgsfield AI across 30+ models plus Marketing Studio branded ads, wrapping the higgsfield CLI for text/image/video-to-media jobs.
interface.longDescription: Pick a sensible default model, pass media inputs straight to flags, and submit with --wait so the CLI blocks and prints the result URL in one shot.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Higgsfield Generate safely.
